# ANALYSIS: RIBBON_GATE_VIX_WR_ANALYSIS

**Filed:** 2026-05-31  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** filter_analysis  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-STAGE-1-BACKTEST per task)

## Hypothesis

Testing whether the RIBBON_GATE filter improves win rate across different VIX regimes by avoiding low-quality entries during compressed ribbon conditions. We hypothesize that the gate will show higher WR in elevated VIX bands (>20) where ribbon expansion signals genuine breakouts, and lower WR in low VIX bands (<15) where ribbon compression indicates chop.

## Mechanism

Run Stage-1 backtest with RIBBON_GATE active (as defined in strategy/candidates/2026-05-31-ribbon-momentum-gate.md). For each entry trigger, log:
- Entry timestamp
- VIX close value from same bar
- Trade outcome (win/loss)
- Dollar P&L

Post-backtest, stratify trades into VIX bands: [<15, 15-20, 20-25, 25+]. Compute win rate, average P&L/trade, and trade count per band. Also evaluate impact on J anchor days (4/29, 5/01, 5/04 winners; 5/05, 5/06, 5/07 losers) to ensure gate doesn't degrade OP-16 edge capture.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=28 requires $25K+; $1K paper ~= 14% headline P&L (per OP-20 disclosure 1)
2. **Sample bias:** Stage-1 backtest uses 16-month SPY 5m data (Jan 2025-May 2026). Selection method: all days where RIBBON_GATE conditions are evaluated. Overfit risk: medium (filter uses visual ribbon conditions; needs walk-forward validation)
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (Stage-1 only; requires walk-forward held-out window)
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (top 3 J days not validated with realistic OPRA simulation)
5. **Failure modes:** 
   - Worst day: filter may block valid entries during volatile breakouts if ribbon misreads expansion (e.g., 5/04 if gate too strict)
   - Max drawdown: potential increase if filter causes missed winners during trending days
   - Blow-up scenario: false gate signals during chop leading to whipsaw losses
6. **Concentration:** unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest (will compute top-5 days % of P&L post-backtest)

## Pre-merge gate

<what tests need to pass: gym validators, walk-forward, real-fills>
- Gym validators: 70/70 PASS (ribbon_gate logic)
- Walk-forward: OOS/IS Sharpe ratio >=0.50 on 12-month IS / 4-month OOS
- Real-fills: N>=10 OPRA cases on top 3 J days with WR>=60% and P&L within ±20% of BS sim
- J anchor preservation: edge_capture >=771 (50% of max 1542) vs baseline

## Confidence

6 / 10 -- based on preliminary watcher logic showing ribbon expansion correlates with breakout validity; requires Stage-1 backtest to quantify
